fields.description:
# Workflow engine v2: declarative IR + thin interpreter + provider-agnostic runtime + visual editing

## Context

Split out of the remediation epic 6f2d (soupy-spool-revel) per the deep-design brainstorm (session log
ad3f-2d99-6d41-40e6 "boom-demon-jug"). The brainstorm established that "remediation" is really a
re-architecture of the workflow engine; THIS epic owns the BUILD. 6f2d retains remediation-on-top (docs,
migrating existing reviewers onto this engine, prompts, eval coverage, cleanup, visual+eval review,
intent-alignment) and depends_on this epic. Every decision is grounded in 4 deep-research rounds + codebase
spikes + 3 passing de-risk POCs under docs/experiments/workflow-remediation-pocs/ (REFERENCE, not deliverables).

## What we are building (4 parts)

- **Declarative IR (git source of truth):** one YAML/JSON file per workflow; steps are deterministic
  (`uses:` an INTERNAL registered op) or agentic (`prompt:` an LLM step); control flow (conditional
  branches, bounded loops, map/fan-out) expressed as DATA; stable step ids. Evolves v1 GitHub-Actions YAML.
- **Thin synchronous interpreter (engine):** run-state on rebar's EVENT LOG (genuine reuse —
  WORKFLOW_RUN/WORKFLOW_STEP events on the target ticket, same reducer/commit/push); iteration-keyed
  idempotency markers; mandatory max_iterations; control-flow state derived from recorded outputs
  (replay-correctness discipline the engine POC proved). BOUNDED-CONCURRENT fan-out: parallel LLM calls,
  serialized commits (decision: included in v1).
- **Provider-agnostic agent runtime behind the existing Runner seam:** Pydantic AI, REPLACING
  LangChain/LangGraph (sole justification — native Langfuse tracing — is obsolete; Langfuse is OTel-native).
  Runs single-turn LLM calls AND tool-using agents (filesystem + MCP + custom rebar-op tools). Tracing via
  OTel -> Langfuse, dev/maintenance only (clients pay nothing).
- **Ephemeral visual editor:** bpmn-js (constrained BPMN metamodel — NOT draw.io's free-form canvas, which
  would allow edits that don't map back). A thin IR<->BPMN serializer (bpmn-moddle + a registered `rebar`
  moddle descriptor) projects the IR for editing and round-trips back; the visual format is NEVER committed
  (auto-layout on open).

## Structured-output reliability (output feeds deterministic steps — reliability is key)

Retire the second-interpreter LLM (a recognized anti-pattern). Layered stack (research-grounded):
1. Provider-native CONSTRAINED decoding / strict json_schema where supported (OpenAI strict ~100% vs <40%;
   Gemini responseSchema; **Anthropic native structured outputs now GA**) via Pydantic AI NativeOutput; else
   PromptedOutput cross-provider.
2. Deterministic tolerant parse of near-miss output (json-repair) — no LLM.
3. Pydantic validation + normalizing validators (numeric/length bounds HERE, not in the JSON Schema, to stay
   inside Anthropic's strict-grammar subset).
4. Bounded SAME-model retry feeding the validation error back (Pydantic AI retries={'output': 2}; raise the
   default budget of 1).
Handle Anthropic stop_reason in {refusal, max_tokens}; for steps needing extended thinking, SPLIT reasoning
and structured extraction into two steps (thinking is a tradeoff vs forced structured output).

## Dependencies

- Reuse: event-sourced git store (run-state), git-canonical prompt library, Inspect AI eval seam, Runner seam.
- Add (runtime, light): pydantic-ai-slim[anthropic,...] (~41 pkgs vs LangGraph ~80-110); provider SDKs;
  json-repair; OTel exporter ([tracing]) -> Langfuse.
- Drop: langchain, langgraph, langchain-mcp-adapters.
- Add (edit-time ONLY, out-of-process): bpmn-js (browser editor) + bpmn-moddle (MIT serializer). NOT runtime.
- Build (the only custom code): IR schema+linter (low risk); interpreter (moderate, justified by
  event-sourcing); Pydantic-AI Runner adapter (low); IR<->BPMN serializer (moderate, bounded — bpmn-moddle +
  one descriptor + round-trip fixtures; POC-validated).

## How it meets the invariants
- I1 human visual edit incl. loops/conditionals: bpmn-js (constrained metamodel) + round-trip serializer.
- I2 LLM edit+validate: lean schema'd IR; atomic id-keyed edit ops + schema + linter validation.
- I3 git-stored, clean diff NOT required: only the IR is committed; visual format ephemeral.
- I4 light runtime / heavy edit-deps OK: interpreter is stdlib; agent runtime lazy-loaded for agent steps;
  visual editor out-of-process.
- Cross-provider (hard req): Pydantic AI provider-agnostic, NO per-provider code; Anthropic-only rejected.
- Tool-using agents (FS+MCP+rebar ops): native to Pydantic AI (validated).
- Deterministic step logic INTERNAL-only (registry not exposed via CLI/MCP).
- Don't-build-unique-engine is EARNED: every off-the-shelf engine (DBOS/Restate/Spiff) owns its run-state and
  conflicts with event-sourcing; standard formats (BPMN/ASL) carry impedance > a lean IR.

## De-risk POCs (all PASS; docs/experiments/workflow-remediation-pocs/)
- engine_interpreter_poc.py: replay exactly-once across ALL crash points (deepest risk retired).
- runtime_pydanticai_poc.py: cross-provider integration validated; Claude thinking+structured-output 400
  reproduced AND mitigated (PromptedOutput); dep weight 41.
- visual_bpmn_roundtrip_poc.mjs: IR<->BPMN round-trip preserves ids / multi-instance / agent metadata.

## Known limitations
- We own/maintain the interpreter (replay correctness is subtle — POC found+fixed one bug; contained by the
  state-discipline rule + tests).
- IR<->BPMN serializer is bespoke and bounded by BPMN's vocabulary (our IR must map onto BPMN).
- Agent-step config richness in the canvas is limited (edit flow visually, prompts in text).
- Pydantic AI is young (2.0 beta incoming) — contained by the strict swappable Runner seam.
- OTel->Langfuse token/cost attribute mapping is a known soft spot (analytics, not span structure).
- Cross-provider COMPLETION proven on Anthropic; OpenAI/Google billing-blocked (integration validated).

## Success Criteria
- [ ] v2 declarative IR (steps + conditionals + loops + map) with a JSON Schema + linter, agent-editable.
- [ ] Thin interpreter executing it with run-state on the event log, deterministic resume/replay, and
      bounded-concurrent fan-out.
- [ ] Agent runtime swapped to provider-agnostic Pydantic AI behind the Runner seam; LangGraph dropped.
- [ ] Structured-output reliability stack (native/strict + tolerant parse + validators + bounded retry); the
      second-interpreter LLM retired.
- [ ] Human visual view+edit via bpmn-js over an ephemeral IR<->BPMN projection.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] v2 IR JSON Schema + v1->v2 migrate shim + linter (cycles legal only via declared loop frames); coverage guard.
- [ ] Interpreter: conditionals/loops/map; iteration-keyed (run_id,step_id,iteration) markers; mandatory
      max_iterations; replay tests (kill mid-run -> replay from events -> no double effects).
- [ ] Bounded-concurrent fan-out: parallel agent calls + serialized event commits; deterministic replay
      preserved; Burr tripwire relaxed NARROWLY for the map path only (recorded).
- [ ] PydanticAIRunner behind the Runner seam; FS+MCP+custom tools; structured output via NativeOutput/
      PromptedOutput (NOT forced-tool ToolOutput); validate + bounded retry; parallel-run-and-diff vs the old
      LangGraph path to the DEFINED PARITY BAR (child 7d58: non-inferiority on the eval corpus — validity >= v1,
      per-criterion verdict-agreement >= 95% + zero decision flips, recall/false-accept within +/-2pp) before
      cutover; the bar gates the LangGraph drop.
- [ ] LangChain/LangGraph/langchain-mcp-adapters removed; tracing via [tracing] OTel->Langfuse, optional.
- [ ] Structured-output reliability layers 1-4 implemented; thinking+extraction split where needed;
      stop_reason handling; second-interpreter LLM removed.
- [ ] bpmn-js editor + IR<->BPMN serializer with a registered `rebar` moddle descriptor + round-trip fixtures
      (ids, agent metadata, multi-instance survive); visual format never committed.
- [ ] docs reference the 3 de-risk POCs.
